YOUR NAME / SYSTEMS ENGINEER

AUSTERE. DETERMINISTIC. LOW LATENCY.

C-first projects tuned for predictable execution. No frameworks, no bloat, no runtime surprises. Designed with HFT-style discipline: bounded allocations, cache-aware structures, and measurable latency targets.

Projects

orderbook-engine

C17, lock-free rings, epoll

Deterministic matching engine with microsecond-level latency budget.

repo

nanotcp

C11, io_uring, zero-copy

User-space TCP experiment focused on throughput per core.

repo

risk-gate

C, SIMD, fixed-point math

Pre-trade risk validation path with strict p99 constraints.
